title: JujutsuFIN
description: An addon for Orca's Jujutsu Craft mod.
body:
**JujutsuFIN** is an addon for Orca's [JujutsuCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/orca-jujutsu-craft) mod that attempts to add QOL changes and Customisation to enhance the player's experience.

## Features

### Custom Techniques

*   Kenjaku
*   Utahime
*   Kaori
*   Rozetsu
*   Mechamaru

### Veils

*   There are also settings for veils.

### Domain and Passive Hotkey

*   There is a Config file for holding or pressing the button.

### Commands

*   /jjkfin - Jujutsucraft utilities command
*   /finteams - teams command

### GameRules (start with jjkfin)

*   BlackFlashChance
*   RCTCost
*   SixEyesMultiplier
*   SukunaMultiplier
*   FatigueRate
*   BurnoutCost
*   VeilRadius
*   KenjakuTechniquesLimit
*   SukunaPVP
*   MBANoDeath
*   KenjakuKeepTechniques
*   YujiBloodManipulation
